title: Portolan Versions Manifest
description: Schema for versions.json - tracks version history, asset checksums, and sync state per collection. See https://github.com/portolan-sdi/portolan-spec/blob/main/versions.md

spec_version.description: Schema version for the versions.json format

oneOf.description: Null if no versions exist yet

versions.description: List of version entries, oldest first

VersionEntry.description: A single version entry in the version history

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp in UTC (must end with 'Z')

breaking.description: True if this version has breaking changes (schema changes, column removals, CRS changes)

assets.description: Map of asset keys to asset metadata. Keys are collection-relative paths.

changes.description: List of asset keys that changed in this version (new or modified)

schema.description: Optional schema fingerprint for breaking change detection (ADR-0005)

message.description: Optional human-readable description of the change

AssetEntry.description: Metadata for a single asset (file) within a version

sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of the file content

source_path.description: Optional relative path to the original source file (e.g., the GeoJSON that was converted to this GeoParquet)

source_mtime.description: Optional Unix timestamp of the source file when conversion occurred. Used to detect when source has changed. NOTE: Accepts number (not just integer) because Python's os.stat().st_mtime returns floats.

mtime.description: Optional Unix timestamp of the asset file itself. Used for fast-path change detection (ADR-0017). NOTE: Accepts number (not just integer) because Python's os.stat().st_mtime returns floats. This relaxation should be upstreamed to portolan-spec.

SchemaInfo.description: Schema information for breaking change detection (ADR-0005)

fingerprint.description: Type-specific schema fingerprint for change detection
